description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, a vented hem, and an appliquéd logo on the left chest and below the nape of the neckFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironDo not dry cleanThe round neckline and straight cut makes this T-shirt from puma an ideal weekend wear. The 'Leaping cat' logo on the chest adds to the value and integrity of the brand that puma stands for, while the cotton fabric makes your days lighter and plays longer in ease. Pair it with denims and sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
